markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Stalker in Darkened Boughs](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=10)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 20

Stalkers in darkened boughs make their homes in ancient forests and jungles unfriendly to humanoids and others who would exert control or influence over nature's designs. These apparitions are drawn to animists who harbor violent thoughts or impulses but are more likely to linger with animists who can quell their hatred. Stalkers in darkened boughs are moody, impulsive, and prone to seeing things from the least charitable perspective.

**Apparition Skills** Forest Lore, Hunting Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Gouging Claw](/Spells.aspx?ID=1546)
- **1st** [Runic Body](/Spells.aspx?ID=1657)
- **2nd** [Vomit Swarm](/Spells.aspx?ID=2041)
- **3rd** [Wall of Thorns](/Spells.aspx?ID=1752)
- **4th** [Bestial Curse](/Spells.aspx?ID=1966)
- **5th** [Moon Frenzy](/Spells.aspx?ID=1609)
- **6th** [Tangling Creepers](/Spells.aspx?ID=1714)
- **7th** [Unfettered Pack](/Spells.aspx?ID=1733)
- **8th** [Monstrosity Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=1608)
- **9th** [Wrathful Storm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1759)

**Vessel Spell** [Darkened Forest Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=2143)

**Avatar** _Beast of the Boughs_ Speed 70 feet, fly Speed 70 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> devouring jaws ([deadly 3d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=570), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684)), **Damage** 6d10+6 piercing
name: Stalker in Darkened Boughs

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Steward of Stone and Fire](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=11)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 20

Stewards of stone and fire linger near volcanoes and deep places near the heart of the earth, hot springs where the water is too scorchingly hot to allow casual enjoyment, and other places where the barrier between fire and earth is thin or nonexistent, though particularly old rock formations, canyons, and other natural features of earth may also spawn or attract them. Stewards of stone and fire are quick to anger and slow to forget.

**Apparition Skills** Mountain Lore, Volcano Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Ignition](/Spells.aspx?ID=1565)
- **1st** [Interposing Earth](/Spells.aspx?ID=1337)
- **2nd** [Exploding Earth](/Spells.aspx?ID=1331)
- **3rd** [Fireball](/Spells.aspx?ID=1530)
- **4th** [Wall of Fire](/Spells.aspx?ID=1748)
- **5th** [Wall of Stone](/Spells.aspx?ID=1751)
- **6th** [Petrify](/Spells.aspx?ID=1628)
- **7th** [Volcanic Eruption](/Spells.aspx?ID=1746)
- **8th** [Earthquake](/Spells.aspx?ID=1507)
- **9th** [Falling Stars](/Spells.aspx?ID=1521)

**Vessel Spell** [Earth's Bile](/Spells.aspx?ID=2144)

**Avatar** _Blood of Planets_ Speed 50 feet, burrow Speed 50 feet, ignore [difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453); **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> avalanche of molten stone ([reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [versatile B](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d10+6 fire; **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> cleansing eruption ([fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=604), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+6 fire
name: Steward of Stone and Fire

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Vanguard of Roaring Waters](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=12)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 21

Vanguards of roaring waters are found where rivers carve their way through mountains, creating fearsome rapids. They can also be found near bays where rivers meet the sea and create turbulent breakers and unpredictable undertows, coastal reefs that tear the bottoms from unwary ships and isolate islands, or anywhere else where water becomes violent and difficult to navigate safely. Vanguards of roaring waters encourage chaos and are easily bored.

**Apparition Skills** Mountain Lore, River Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Rousing Splash](/Spells.aspx?ID=1395)
- **1st** [Hydraulic Push](/Spells.aspx?ID=1561)
- **2nd** [Mist](/Spells.aspx?ID=1606)
- **3rd** [Crashing Wave](/Spells.aspx?ID=1984)
- **4th** [Hydraulic Torrent](/Spells.aspx?ID=1562)
- **5th** [Control Water](/Spells.aspx?ID=1473)
- **6th** [Personal Ocean](/Spells.aspx?ID=1393)
- **7th** [Dancing Fountain](/Spells.aspx?ID=1385)
- **8th** [Whirlpool](/Spells.aspx?ID=1398)
- **9th** [Wrathful Storm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1759)

**Vessel Spell** [River Carving Mountains](/Spells.aspx?ID=2145)

**Avatar** _River that Splits the World_ Speed 50 feet, swim Speed 70 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> parting mountains ([reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724), [water](/Traits.aspx?ID=732)), **Damage** 6d10+6 bludgeoning **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> crash into the sea ([range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [versatile P](/Traits.aspx?ID=724), [water](/Traits.aspx?ID=732)), **Damage** 6d6+6 bludgeoning
name: Vanguard of Roaring Waters

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Witness to Ancient Battles](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=13)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 21

Witnesses to ancient battles may be the lingering remnants of soldiers who never returned from their last deployment or the restless souls of warriors whose final contest left them unfulfilled. Or the apparitions may be valkyries and other beings from beyond, naturally drawn to sites of death and battle, or even the unquiet entity formed from a battlefield that saw so much death and blood it gained a spiritual essence of its own. Witnesses to ancient battles are often somber and grim.

**Apparition Skills** Battlegrounds Lore, Heraldry Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Shield](/Spells.aspx?ID=1671)
- **1st** [Sure Strike](/Spells.aspx?ID=1709)
- **2nd** [Enlarge](/Spells.aspx?ID=1514)
- **3rd** [Ghostly Weapon](/Spells.aspx?ID=1544)
- **4th** [Weapon Storm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1758)
- **5th** [Invoke Spirits](/Spells.aspx?ID=1578)
- **6th** [Phantasmal Calamity](/Spells.aspx?ID=1630)
- **7th** [True Target](/Spells.aspx?ID=1726)
- **8th** [Canticle of Everlasting Grief](/Spells.aspx?ID=1459)
- **9th** [Weapon of Judgment](/Spells.aspx?ID=2044)

**Vessel Spell** [Embodiment of Battle](/Spells.aspx?ID=2146)

**Avatar** _General of Endless Battle_ Speed 70 feet, immune to [immobilized](/Conditions.aspx?ID=81); **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> final strike ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [fatal d12](/Traits.aspx?ID=597), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684)), **Damage** 6d8+6 slashing
name: Witness to Ancient Battles

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Limited">[Shepherd of Errant Winds](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=14)</title>

**Source** [Pathfinder #216: The Acropolis Pyre](/Sources.aspx?ID=271) pg. 83

Often spun from eddies in the wake of air elementals, a shepherd of errant winds delights in movement and freedom. They might seek animists in breezy canyons or aboard ships cruising the trade winds, after which the apparition follows an animist to less airy locales. However, a shepherd of errant winds chafes at idleness and stirs up trouble if its surroundings seem too still.

**Apparition Skills** Sailing Lore, Scouting Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Slashing Gust](/Spells.aspx?ID=1321)
- **1st** [Tailwind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1711)
- **2nd** [Propulsive Breeze](/Spells.aspx?ID=1319)
- **3rd** [Wall of Wind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1753)
- **4th** [Vapor Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=1738)
- **5th** [Scouting Eye](/Spells.aspx?ID=1661)
- **6th** [Mislead](/Spells.aspx?ID=1605)
- **7th** [Vacuum](/Spells.aspx?ID=1324)
- **8th** [Punishing Winds](/Spells.aspx?ID=1643)
- **9th** [Wrathful Storm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1759)

**Vessel Spell** [Gift of the Anemos](/Spells.aspx?ID=2522)

**Avatar** _Will of the Winds_ Speed 40 feet, fly 70 feet, ignore [difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453); **Melee** <actions string="" /> air blast ([air](/Traits.aspx?ID=527), [reach 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684)), **Damage** 6d8+6 bludgeoning; **Ranged** <actions string="" /> thunderclap ([electricity](/Traits.aspx?ID=586), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [versatile sonic](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+3 electricity
name: Shepherd of Errant Winds

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Limited">[Speaker in Sibilance](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=15)</title>

**Source** [Pathfinder #216: The Acropolis Pyre](/Sources.aspx?ID=271) pg. 83

Whether witnessed in hissing serpents or the whisper of pungent fumes wafting up from a forlorn cave, a speaker in sibilance offers forbidden knowledge and revels in the anguish of an unprepared mind. These apparitions often take medusa-like forms, each serpent providing different (and often contradictory) advice.

**Apparition Skills** Fortune-Telling Lore, Mountain Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Puff of Poison](/Spells.aspx?ID=2016)
- **1st** [Ill Omen](/Spells.aspx?ID=1566)
- **2nd** [Stupefy](/Spells.aspx?ID=1691)
- **3rd** [Hypercognition](/Spells.aspx?ID=1563)
- **4th** [Snake Fangs](/Spells.aspx?ID=1959)
- **5th** [Slither](/Spells.aspx?ID=1676)
- **6th** [Petrify](/Spells.aspx?ID=1628)
- **7th** [Mask of Terror](/Spells.aspx?ID=1595)
- **8th** [Unrelenting Observation](/Spells.aspx?ID=1734)
- **9th** [Unfathomable Song](/Spells.aspx?ID=1731)

**Vessel Spell** [Crown of Prophets](/Spells.aspx?ID=2521)

**Avatar** _Medusa of Merciless Mysteries_ Speed 60 feet, climb 60 feet; **Melee** <actions string="" /> biting hair ([poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684)), **Damage** 6d6+6 piercing plus 2d6 [persistent poison](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29); **Ranged** <actions string="" /> jarring prophecy ([mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [versatile sonic](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+3 mental
name: Speaker in Sibilance

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Limited">[Lamentation of Sinister Deals](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=16)</title>

**Source** [Pathfinder #223: Hell's Destiny](/Sources.aspx?ID=336) pg. 226

Lamentations of sinister deals linger where mortals sold their integrity, loyalties, or even their souls in pursuit of short-term gain. While some of these apparitions lurk near corrupt courthouses or fey marketplaces, the greatest concentration emanates from Cheliax’s Whisperwood, where Abrogail I penned a baleful bargain with [Hell](/Planes.aspx?ID=42).

These apparitions coach an animist in crafting their own deals, though the same apparition often harbors an inconsolable fear of a specific contract type, such as [infernal contracts](/Rules.aspx?ID=1460) or real estate deeds. Some lamentations of sinister deals might actually be damned souls that have narrowly avoided the River of Souls, knowing they’ll be dragged to Hell once they arrive. Theoretically, an animist could earn the apparition’s loyalty if they could unravel whatever contract cursed the apparition in the first place. A lamentation of sinister deals tempts the animist with deals of its own, granting minor wishes with its spirit magic to impart momentary knowledge or power if the animist simply signs on the figurative line.

**Apparition Skills** Legal Lore, Scribing Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Message](/Spells.aspx?ID=1598)
- **1st** [Sure Strike](/Spells.aspx?ID=1709)
- **2nd** [Blistering Invective](/Spells.aspx?ID=1970)
- **3rd** [Hypercognition](/Spells.aspx?ID=1563)
- **4th** [Honeyed Words](/Spells.aspx?ID=1558)
- **5th** [Breath of Life](/Spells.aspx?ID=1456)
- **6th** [Sacred Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=2020)
- **7th** [Contingency](/Spells.aspx?ID=1472)
- **8th** [Moment of Renewal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1607)
- **9th** [Resplendent Mansion](/Spells.aspx?ID=2018)

**Vessel Spell** [Wish Market](/Spells.aspx?ID=2620)

**Avatar** _Cosmic Notary_ Speed 30 feet, [fly](/Actions.aspx?ID=2312) 50 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> burning pen ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [versatile fire](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+6 piercing; **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> exacting language ([fatal d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=597), [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647), [range 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+6 mental
name: Lamentation of Sinister Deals

<summary>

summary_markdown: Lamentations of sinister deals linger where mortals sold their integrity, loyalties, or even their souls in pursuit of short-term gain. While some of …
text: Lamentation of Sinister Deals Source Pathfinder #223: Hell's Destiny pg. 226 Lamentations of sinister deals linger where mortals sold their integrity, loyalties, or even their souls in pursuit of short-term gain. While some of these apparitions lurk near corrupt courthouses or fey marketplaces, the greatest concentration emanates from Cheliax’s Whisperwood, where Abrogail I penned a baleful bargain with Hell. These apparitions coach an animist in crafting their own deals, though the same apparition often harbors an inconsolable fear of a specific contract type, such as infernal contracts or real estate deeds. Some lamentations of sinister deals might actually be damned souls that have narrowly avoided the River of Souls, knowing they’ll be dragged to Hell once they arrive. Theoretically, an animist could earn the apparition’s loyalty if they could unravel whatever contract cursed the apparition in the first place. A lamentation of sinister deals tempts the animist with deals of its own, granting minor wishes with its spirit magic to impart momentary knowledge or power if the animist simply signs on the figurative line. Apparition Skills Legal Lore, Scribing Lore Apparition Spells - Cantrip Message - 1st Sure Strike - 2nd Blistering Invective - 3rd Hypercognition - 4th Honeyed Words - 5th Breath of Life - 6th Sacred Form - 7th Contingency - 8th Moment of Renewal - 9th Resplendent Mansion Vessel Spell Wish Market Avatar Cosmic Notary Speed 30 feet, fly 50 feet; Melee Single Action burning pen (agile, reach 15 feet, versatile fire), Damage 6d6+6 piercing; Ranged Single Action exacting language (fatal d10, mental, range 60 feet), Damage 6d6+6 mental

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Crafter in the Vault](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=3)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 17

Crafters in the vault are found in dungeons, forges, or other places where creation and injury occur concurrently. They enjoy partnering with animists who compliment them on their creations, but often become jealous when anyone else intrudes on their expertise, including casting any of the spells that appear on their apparition list.

**Apparition Skills** Architecture Lore, Engineering Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Sigil](/Spells.aspx?ID=1673)
- **1st** [Mending](/Spells.aspx?ID=1597)
- **2nd** [Knock](/Spells.aspx?ID=1581)

- **4th** [Creation](/Spells.aspx?ID=1477)
- **5th** [Impaling Spike](/Spells.aspx?ID=1571)

- **7th** [Beheading Buzz Saw](/Spells.aspx?ID=1365)
- **8th** [Ferrous Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=1369)
- **9th** [Resplendent Mansion](/Spells.aspx?ID=2018)

**Vessel Spell** [Traveling Workshop](/Spells.aspx?ID=2137)

**Avatar** _Incarnate Dungeon_ Speed 50 feet, either burrow Speed 50 feet or fly Speed 50 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> dungeon trap ([reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [versatile B or P](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+6 slashing plus [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=45); **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> deadly darts ([range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [versatile poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+6 piercing

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Custodian of Groves and Gardens](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=4)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 18

Custodians of groves and gardens frequent tended greenery and farmlands cared for by loving stewards, and other places of reflection and restoration where green things grow. Some of these apparitions linger in the mortal realms not because they have lost their way, but because they believe they have already found [Elysium](/Planes.aspx?ID=40). Others are the cultivated spiritual essence of the location itself. Custodians of groves and gardens are peaceful, quiet, and averse to conflict.

**Apparition Skills** Farming Lore, Herbalism Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Tangle Vine](/Spells.aspx?ID=1713)
- **1st** [Protector Tree](/Spells.aspx?ID=2015)
- **2nd** [Gentle Breeze](/Spells.aspx?ID=1316)
- **3rd** [Safe Passage](/Spells.aspx?ID=1659)
- **4th** [Peaceful Bubble](/Spells.aspx?ID=1624)
- **5th** [Truespeech](/Spells.aspx?ID=1728)
- **6th** [Field of Life](/Spells.aspx?ID=1526)
- **7th** [Lifewood Cage](/Spells.aspx?ID=2006)
- **8th** [Moment of Renewal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1607)
- **9th** [Nature’s Enmity](/Spells.aspx?ID=2010)

**Vessel Spell** [Garden of Healing](/Spells.aspx?ID=2166)

**Avatar** _Peaceful Reaches_ Speed 60 feet, ignore [difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453); **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> garden's cradle ([agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [reach 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382)), **Damage** 6d6+6 bludgeoning plus [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=45); **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> impose peace ([nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+6 mental
name: Custodian of Groves and Gardens

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Echo of Lost Moments](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=5)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 18

Echoes of lost moments are apparitions born from memories that everyone has forgotten, often arising from fragmented pieces of magic and memory left behind by time-altering magic. They may even occur in response to significant temporal tampering, cleaning up fragments of time damaged by irresponsible magic. These apparitions are drawn to animists who are orderly and responsible, and they can give such hosts access to spells that alter a target's timeline or removes them from the current timeline, reveal visions of past or future events, or even accelerate magical effects to a point in time where they have already ended.

**Apparition Skills** Fortune-Telling Lore, Genealogy Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Figment](/Spells.aspx?ID=1528)
- **1st** [Déjà Vu](/Spells.aspx?ID=1986)
- **2nd** [Dispel Magic](/Spells.aspx?ID=1493)
- **3rd** [Curse of Lost Time](/Spells.aspx?ID=1985)
- **4th** [Vision of Death](/Spells.aspx?ID=1742)
- **5th** [Illusory Scene](/Spells.aspx?ID=1570)
- **6th** [Phantasmal Calamity](/Spells.aspx?ID=1630)
- **7th** [Retrocognition](/Spells.aspx?ID=1652)
- **8th** [Quandary](/Spells.aspx?ID=1644)
- **9th** [Foresight](/Spells.aspx?ID=1537)

**Vessel Spell** [Store Time](/Spells.aspx?ID=2138)

**Avatar** _Devourer of Lost Time_ Speed 30 feet, fly Speed 50 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> devour potential ([reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510)), **Damage** 6d10+6 void; **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> scream of loss ([range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510)), **Damage** 6d6+6 void
name: Echo of Lost Moments

<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Impostor in Hidden Places](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=6)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 18

Impostors in hidden places whisper in quiet corners where mortal voices rarely resound, hoarding secrets and pondering unknowable truths. They often bring misfortune to those who disturb them, though an animist who earns their trust will find that they make effective allies.

**Apparition Skills** Fortune-Telling Lore, Underworld Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Telekinetic Hand](/Spells.aspx?ID=1715)
- **1st** [Ill Omen](/Spells.aspx?ID=1566)
- **2nd** [Invisibility](/Spells.aspx?ID=1577)
- **3rd** [Veil of Privacy](/Spells.aspx?ID=1739)
- **4th** [Liminal Doorway](/Spells.aspx?ID=1587)

- **6th** [Mislead](/Spells.aspx?ID=1605)
- **7th** [Planar Palace](/Spells.aspx?ID=1634)
- **8th** [Disappearance](/Spells.aspx?ID=1490)
- **9th** [Phantasmagoria](/Spells.aspx?ID=1629)

**Vessel Spell** [Discomfiting Whisper](/Spells.aspx?ID=2139)

**Avatar** _Whisper Hiding in Shadows_ Speed 50 feet, fly Speed 50 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> shadowed touch ([reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [versatile cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d10+6 void; **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> whisper of despair ([range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 6d6+6 void
name: Impostor in Hidden Places

<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Lurker in Devouring Dark](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=7)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 19

_[**PFS Note**](/pathfinder-society) Animists with the Lurker in Devouring Dark apparition are permitted to use the variant rules for Dark Tapestry lurkers._

Lurkers in devouring dark are most often near old shipwrecks, deadly icebergs, and other places where ice and deep water are most prevalent. In places where the Dark Tapestry intrudes upon the world, there can be found variant lurkers in devouring dark who offer Dark Tapestry Lore in place of Sailing Lore and whose spells of water and ice instead deal void damage.

**Apparition Skills** Ocean Lore, Sailing Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Caustic Blast](/Spells.aspx?ID=1461)
- **1st** [Grim Tendrils](/Spells.aspx?ID=1548)
- **2nd** [Acid Grip](/Spells.aspx?ID=1436)
- **3rd** [Aqueous Orb](/Spells.aspx?ID=1443)
- **4th** [Grasp of the Deep](/Spells.aspx?ID=1390)
- **5th** [Wall of Ice](/Spells.aspx?ID=1750)
- **6th** [Frost Pillar](/Spells.aspx?ID=1389)
- **7th** [Hungry Depths](/Spells.aspx?ID=1391)
- **8th** [Arctic Rift](/Spells.aspx?ID=1444)
- **9th** [Implosion](/Spells.aspx?ID=1572)

**Vessel Spell** [Devouring Dark Form](/Spells.aspx?ID=2140)

**Avatar** _Tentacles from the Dark_ Speed 70 feet, swim Speed 70 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> grasping tentacles ([reach 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684)), **Damage** 6d10+6 bludgeoning plus [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=45)
name: Lurker in Devouring Dark

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Monarch of the Fey Courts](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=8)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 19

Monarchs of the fey courts make their homes near places with strong ties to the [First World](/Planes.aspx?ID=35), or in places where [nymphs](/MonsterFamilies.aspx?ID=449) once held sway. They are drawn to animists who blend an appreciation for art and nature's beauty with a ruler's ambition. Monarchs of fey courts are vain, capricious, and do not easily forgive slights or poor manners.

**Apparition Skills** Art Lore, Fey Lore

**Apparition Spells**
- **Cantrip** [Tangle Vine](/Spells.aspx?ID=1713)
- **1st** [Charm](/Spells.aspx?ID=1463)
- **2nd** [Create Food](/Spells.aspx?ID=1475)
- **3rd** [Enthrall](/Spells.aspx?ID=1516)
- **4th** [Suggestion](/Spells.aspx?ID=1693)
- **5th** [Hallucination](/Spells.aspx?ID=1551)
- **6th** [Dominate](/Spells.aspx?ID=1501)
- **7th** [Mask of Terror](/Spells.aspx?ID=1595)
- **8th** [Uncontrollable Dance](/Spells.aspx?ID=1730)
- **9th** [Unfathomable Song](/Spells.aspx?ID=1731)

**Vessel Spell** [Nymph's Grace](/Spells.aspx?ID=2141)

**Avatar** _Queen of the Winter Court_ Speed 50 feet, fly Speed 50 feet, swim Speed 50 feet; **Melee** <actions string="Single Action" /> queen's caress ([reach 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526)), **Damage** 6d10+6 mental; **Ranged** <actions string="Single Action" /> monarch's spite ([mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647), [range 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [versatile cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 6d6+6 mental

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animist Apparition " pfs="Standard">[Reveler in Lost Glee](/Apparitions.aspx?ID=9)</title>

**Source** [War of Immortals](/Sources.aspx?ID=232) pg. 19

Revelers in lost glee are twisted apparitions that arise in desolate and abandoned places where people once found great joy. They take immense mirth in causing harm or discomfort to others and do not enjoy being attuned to animists who fail to laugh at their antics.

**Apparition Skills** Circus Lore, Fortune-Telling Lore

text: Reveler in Lost Glee Source War of Immortals pg. 19 Revelers in lost glee are twisted apparitions that arise in desolate and abandoned places where people once found great joy. They take immense mirth in causing harm or discomfort to others and do not enjoy being attuned to animists who fail to laugh at their antics. Apparition Skills Circus Lore, Fortune-Telling Lore Apparition Spells - Cantrip Prestidigitation - 1st Dizzying Colors - 2nd Laughing Fit - 3rd Hypnotize - 4th Confusion - 5th Illusory Scene - 6th Vibrant Pattern - 7th Warp Mind - 8th Quandary - 9th Wails of the Damned Vessel Spell Trickster's Mirrors Avatar Ringmaster of the Dark Celebration Speed 50 feet, ignore difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain; Melee Single Action ringmaster's whip (reach 15 feet, trip), Damage 6d10+6 slashing; Ranged Single Action feast of the lost (acid, range 120 feet, versatile void), Damage 6d6+6 acid
